new_claims.claim_text: The U.S. has bombed Iran’s largest aluminum plant.

new_claims.claim_text: US-Israeli missiles strike Iran's largest aluminum producer, Arak Aluminum Company (IRALCO).
new_claims.notes: Corroborates claim of aluminum plant bombing.
